name: AVEO - 510 Easy-Press Base - 1ml Industrial Series
summary: Its high-quality construction and patented locking system ensure a premium finish, prevent leakage, and maintain the integrity of cannabis oil.
description: Its high-quality construction and patented locking system ensure a premium finish, prevent leakage, and maintain the integrity of cannabis oil. This cartridge is also an economical and environmentally-friendly option, providing a top-notch vaping experience while reducing costs and environmental impact. *Discount visible when added to cart Due to the locking seal once a mouthpiece is attached, it cannot be removed without damaging the cartridge. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
